headline: Tenable Joins Cisco’s SolutionsPlus Program as an Exposure Management Partner for Vulnerability Management Customers
summary: Cisco customers can seamlessly transition from vulnerability management to exposure management with Tenable OneCOLUMBIA, Md., July 23, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Tenable® Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: TENB), the exposure management company, today announced that it has joined Cisco’s SolutionsPlus program to offer its unified exposure management capabilities to Cisco customers. This partnership provides global enterprises with a fast, proven transition to an industry-leading exposure management platform
